positive: A whimsical, symmetrical composition of bioluminescent forest fauna and flora. The central subject features stylized mythical woodland creatures (deer, foxes, owls) integrated with oversized, glowing mushroom clusters and exotic, looping vines. The style is hyper-detailed, black and white line art with selective neon color highlights (teal, gold, violet). Strong contrast is essential. The composition must read as a cohesive, circular, repeating graphic perfect for apparel printing. Overhead, the silhouette of a crescent moon and stylized constellations guide the scene. Studio lighting, vector aesthetic, deep negative space.
negative: blurry, noise, watermark, text, signature, dirty, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, jpeg artifacts, muted colors, realism, photorealistic, photo
